WP-RESP-001.title: Complete Issue #8 Submitted Evidence Intake Path
WP-RESP-001.current_state: Draft and pending evidence handling is guarded, but the real submitted-mode packet path remains blocked until real Issue #8 evidence exists.
WP-RESP-001.target_state: A locally validated submitted-mode packet path exists for real Issue #8 attachments while pilot execution remains blocked.

target_capability.statement: Submitted-mode Issue #8 packet path is deterministic and locally checkable.
target_capability.measurement: Schema or fixture plus validator and CI-visible checks cover missing, malformed, sample, and real-path packet states.

WP-RESP-001.expected_project_delta: Repository gains schema, fixture, validator, CI, and documentation support for a submitted-mode Issue #8 packet path without creating submitted evidence or changing Issue #8 state.
allowed_work: Harden submitted-mode packet schema, fixtures, and validator behavior.
Connect submitted-mode checks to the primary Validate chain when the slice includes CI wiring.
Document how real Issue #8 evidence must be supplied without automation mutating the issue.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Submitted-mode path contract or fixture coverage where applicable.
Deterministic validator coverage for missing, malformed, sample, and real-path packet states.
Documentation that pilot execution remains blocked until real evidence and readiness gates pass.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
definition_of_done: Submitted-mode packet path is locally checkable by deterministic validators.
Sample/template evidence remains rejected as real evidence.
No submitted packet, Issue #8 mutation, or pilot authorization is produced by the Work Package.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: schema and fixtures
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add or harden submitted-mode packet contracts and valid/invalid fixtures.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: validators and CI
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add deterministic validation and wire required checks into Validate.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: docs, STATUS, and integration
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Record the submitted-mode path and remaining evidence boundaries.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: Open PR #141 or successor bridge work modifies the same submitted-packet bridge files and is not reconciled.
Issue #8 real-submission source is absent or ambiguous.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Restate evidence/pilot/readiness/production/release/responsive-correctness boundaries.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.

WP-RESP-002.title: Complete Builder → Responsive Transition Boundary
WP-RESP-002.current_state: Builder → Responsive input eligibility is schema-backed, but the operational handoff path still needs clearer Project Gate and Builder boundary integration.
WP-RESP-002.target_state: Builder/Project Gate to Responsive handoff is operationally clear, validation-backed, and explicitly not a responsive-correctness claim.

target_capability.statement: Builder/Project Gate to Responsive handoff boundary is deterministic and validation-backed.
target_capability.measurement: Contract, schema, fixtures, validator diagnostics, STATUS, and command index identify allowed and blocked handoff states.

WP-RESP-002.expected_project_delta: Repository gains a coherent Builder → Responsive handoff boundary with schema, validator, fixture, documentation, and STATUS traceability while preserving ownership boundaries.
allowed_work: Clarify Project Gate and Builder artifact intake expectations.
Harden boundary fixtures and validator diagnostics for allowed and blocked handoff states.
Document that the handoff validates eligibility and traceability, not live responsive correctness.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Boundary contract update or integration note.
Validator and fixture coverage for Project Gate/Builder handoff states.
STATUS and command-index alignment with active checks.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
definition_of_done: Project Gate and Builder ownership boundaries remain explicit.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: contract and schema boundary
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Clarify the handoff contract and schema references.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: validator and fixture coverage
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add or harden deterministic eligibility checks.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: docs and status integration
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Update command index, STATUS, and boundary docs.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: Official Builder or Project Gate contract reference is missing or unverifiable.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Restate evidence/pilot/readiness/production/release/responsive-correctness boundaries.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.

WP-RESP-003.title: Consolidate Validation Chain and Quality Debt
WP-RESP-003.current_state: Multiple validators, fixture guards, and review-debt records exist, but chain ownership and quality-debt closure need a coherent validation view.
WP-RESP-003.target_state: Primary Validate, validator index, fixture coverage, and review-debt rules are consolidated into one auditable repository validation chain.

target_capability.statement: Validation chain governance is coherent, deterministic, and CI-visible.
target_capability.measurement: Workflow, STATUS, command index, validators, and named quality-debt records align without removing existing safety checks.

WP-RESP-003.expected_project_delta: Repository gains coherent validation-chain governance that makes validators discoverable, keeps STATUS/workflow parity machine-checked, and closes named quality debt without inventing checkpoint tasks.
allowed_work: Consolidate validator index and CI workflow parity.
Close named review-debt items with deterministic checks.
Improve diagnostics where validators already own the behavior.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Updated validation command index and STATUS parity checks.
Named quality-debt closure records or deterministic validator improvements.
CI workflow alignment without removing existing checks.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
definition_of_done: Validation chain remains deterministic and discoverable.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: validator inventory and parity
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Align workflow, STATUS, and command index.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: fixture coverage debt
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add focused valid/invalid fixture coverage for named gaps.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: review-debt closure
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Close documented quality-debt records with deterministic evidence.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: The work would remove or weaken any existing Validate step.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Restate evidence/pilot/readiness/production/release/responsive-correctness boundaries.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.

WP-RESP-004.title: Prepare Shadow-Mode Pilot Readiness Without Production Claim
WP-RESP-004.current_state: Pilot readiness artifacts and dry-run guards exist, but real pilot execution remains blocked until real submitted evidence and readiness gates pass.
WP-RESP-004.target_state: A controlled shadow-mode preparation path is documented and validated while production, release, pilot, and responsive-correctness claims remain false.

target_capability.statement: Shadow-mode preparation is deterministic as a blocked readiness path.
target_capability.measurement: Dry-run validators, stop-condition documentation, and STATUS markers preserve false readiness and production claims.

WP-RESP-004.expected_project_delta: Repository gains a bounded shadow-mode preparation path with dry-run validators, explicit stop conditions, and completion records that cannot authorize pilot execution.
allowed_work: Harden dry-run readiness outputs and stop-condition diagnostics.
Document operator steps that remain manual and blocked until real gates pass.
Add fixtures proving readiness claims stay false without real evidence.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Manual/operator guide updates with explicit stop conditions.
STATUS boundary markers that keep pilot execution blocked.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
definition_of_done: Shadow-mode preparation is reproducible as a blocked path.
Real pilot execution remains not allowed.
Production and release readiness remain false.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.objective: Harden dry-run readiness and stop-condition checks.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: manual shadow-mode path docs
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Document the blocked preparation path and required evidence gates.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.objective: Record that readiness and production claims remain false.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: Real submitted evidence is absent and the slice attempts to authorize live pilot execution.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.

WP-RESP-005.title: Catalog Governance and Selection Refresh
WP-RESP-005.current_state: Automation objective selection is transitioning from retired rolling queue history to an approved Work Package Catalog.
WP-RESP-005.target_state: Catalog maintenance is performed only when a material capability state changes, never as a recurring queue-refresh or reserve-task loop.

target_capability.statement: Catalog governance remains deterministic and does not become a recurring queue-refresh loop.
target_capability.measurement: Schema, validator, docs, and STATUS reject arbitrary tasks and allow catalog changes only for named material state changes.

WP-RESP-005.expected_project_delta: Repository gains explicit catalog governance rules that allow catalog updates when material Work Package state changes while preventing checkpoint-only refresh loops and arbitrary task invention.
allowed_work: Update catalog entries only when a material capability state changes.
Correct stale catalog metadata when a named Work Package is completed, blocked, or superseded.
Add a catalog governance PR only when it unblocks or accurately records named Work Package selection.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Catalog metadata update tied to named Work Package state change.
Validator coverage proving catalog refresh cannot become a queue-depth reserve loop.
Documentation update explaining the material-state-change trigger.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
definition_of_done: Catalog update is tied to a named material state change.
No arbitrary RTAQ task, checkpoint-only PR, or reserve task is introduced.
The rolling queue remains historical archive.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: governance schema and validator
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Harden catalog governance rules when material state changes.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: catalog state update
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Update Work Package state after a named material outcome.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: No material Work Package state changed.
The update exists only to keep a task count, refresh cadence, or checkpoint loop alive.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Restate evidence/pilot/readiness/production/release/responsive-correctness boundaries.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.
